zh.lifeSummary: 當Graf Gunther II von Käfernburg-Schwarzburg於1128年出生在德國時，他的父親Graf Sizzo III von Schwarzburg33歲，母親Gisela von Berg32歲。他於1180年與Adelheid von Loccum-Hallermund結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1197年1月15日在德國賀林根史瓦爾札-可萊斯史瓦茲包格享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Graf Gunther II von Käfernburg-Schwarzburg于1128年出生在德国时，他的父亲Graf Sizzo III von Schwarzburg33岁，母亲Gisela von Berg32岁。他于1180年与Adelheid von Loccum-Hallermund结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1197年1月15日在德国賀林根史瓦爾札-可萊斯史瓦茲包格享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Gunther
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from gund ‘strife’ + heri ‘army’; name of a tragic hero in the Nibelungenlied and in Wagner's Ring cycle.

variants.name: Günter
meanings: from gund ‘strife’ + heri ‘army’; name of a tragic hero in the Nibelungenlied and in Wagner's Ring cycle.

variants.name: Gunter
meanings: from gund ‘strife’ + heri ‘army’; name of a tragic hero in the Nibelungenlied and in Wagner's Ring cycle.

variants.name: Günther
meanings: from gund ‘strife’ + heri ‘army’; name of a tragic hero in the Nibelungenlied and in Wagner's Ring cycle.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Graf Gunther II von Käfernburg-Schwarzburg was born in 1128, in Germany, his father, Graf Sizzo III von Schwarzburg, was 33 and his mother, Gisela von Berg, was 32. He married Adelheid von Loccum-Hallermund in 1180. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 15 January 1197, in Schwarzburg, Schwarza-Kreis, Thuringia, Germany, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Graf Gunther II von Käfernburg-Schwarzburg est né en 1128, à Allemagne, son père, Graf Sizzo III von Schwarzburg, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Gisela von Berg, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Adelheid von Loccum-Hallermund en 1180. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 15 janvier 1197, à Schwarzburg, Schwarza-Kreis, Thüringen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Graf Gunther II von Käfernburg-Schwarzburg 1128 in Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Graf Sizzo III von Schwarzburg 33 und seine Mutter Gisela von Berg 32. Er hat 1180 Adelheid von Loccum-Hallermund geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 15. Januar 1197 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Schwarzburg, Schwarza-Kreis, Thüringen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Graf Gunther II von Käfernburg-Schwarzburg è nato il nel 1128 nel Germania, il suo padre, Graf Sizzo III von Schwarzburg, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Gisela von Berg, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Adelheid von Loccum-Hallermund nel 1180. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 15 gennaio 1197, nel Schwarzburg, Schwarza-Kreis, Thüringen, Germania, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Graf Gunther II von Käfernburg-Schwarzburgが1128年にドイツで生まれた時，父Graf Sizzo III von Schwarzburgは33歳，母Gisela von Bergは32歳であった。1180年にAdelheid von Loccum-Hallermundと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1197年1月15日にドイツスuリンジェンスチワーザ-クレイススチワーズブルグで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Graf Gunther II von Käfernburg-Schwarzburg(이)가 1128년 독일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Graf Sizzo III von Schwarzburg(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Gisela von Berg(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1180년 Adelheid von Loccum-Hallermund(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1197년 1월 15일 독일 스u링 슈워자-크레이스 슈워즈버그에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Graf Gunther II von Käfernburg-Schwarzburg nasceu em 1128, em Alemanha, seu pai, Graf Sizzo III von Schwarzburg, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Gisela von Berg, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelheid von Loccum-Hallermund em 1180. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 15 de janeiro de 1197, em Schwarzburg, Schwarza-Kreis, Thüringen, Alemanha, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Graf Gunther II von Käfernburg-Schwarzburg родился в 1128 г. в местности Германия, его отцу по имени Graf Sizzo III von Schwarzburg было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Gisela von Berg, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelheid von Loccum-Hallermund в 1180 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 15 января 1197 г. в местности щварзбург, щварза-крис, тuринген, Германия в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Graf Gunther II von Käfernburg-Schwarzburg nació en 1128, en Alemania, su papá, Graf Sizzo III von Schwarzburg, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Gisela von Berg, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Adelheid von Loccum-Hallermund en 1180. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 15 de enero de 1197, en Schwarzburg, Schwarza-Kreis, Thüringen, Alemania, a la edad de 69 años.
